formal_statement: If an event does not cross the instrumented evidence-emission boundary, no backend choice may be credited with proving its occurrence.
failure_if_violated: LJI 2.0 would conceal the strongest formal review surviving attack.

formal_statement: A backend receives capability credit for a property only when the formal definitions/formal review assumptions required for that property are satisfied.
failure_if_violated: A2 could be overcredited for non-equivocation without A7 or A3 without A8.

formal_statement: If backend x weakly satisfies every demanded property at no greater burden than backend y, and strictly improves at least one demanded property or burden, x must not be ranked below y.
failure_if_violated: The index would violate basic decision coherence.

formal_statement: Among backends satisfying mandatory screens, the least burdensome sufficient backend is preferred unless a stronger backend has a validated material advantage.
failure_if_violated: The model would recreate ledger maximalism.

formal_statement: A mandatory non-equivocation, legal-traceability or freshness requirement cannot be offset by lower storage or latency burden.
failure_if_violated: A cheap backend could be recommended despite failing a hard evidential duty.

formal_statement: Permissible affine changes in raw measurement scales must not change backend ordering after declared unit-interval normalisation.
failure_if_violated: Backend choice would be an artefact of measurement units.

formal_statement: Interactions are permitted only when explicitly registered; otherwise the additive value-function form assumes preferential independence within criterion groups.
failure_if_violated: Weights would smuggle in untested dependencies.

formal_statement: Legal criteria encode technical traceability needs derived from legal traceability; they do not assert legal compliance by themselves.
failure_if_violated: A technical score would be misrepresented as legal advice.

formal_statement: Weights, margins and thresholds remain parameters until Delphi validation or an explicit sensitivity-only interpretation is reported.
failure_if_violated: LJI 2.0 would repeat the v1 threshold defect.
